calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Anthony Vaughn (212)

Minor'S Compromise In Scd
Off Calendar Aug-31-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
Paul Melodia, Esq. for Petitioner: Dino Primofiore, Sr., present as Guardian at litem for: Julian Stehle, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $250,000.00 is approved.
No Fees or Costs.
$230,000.00 of the settlement proceeds to be used for purchase of an ANNUITY as described in Attachment 7(2)(b) of the Order, a net balance of $20,000.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with US Bank, 427 E. Olive Ave., Turlock, CA. 95380, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Counsel to prepare the Orders.

Aug. 31, 2005
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed by Comm. Kaplan.
